common.pageNotFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
common.pageErrorDesc: Something went wrong on our end. You can try refreshing or head back home.
common.madeFor: Made with care for rural communities.

auth.loginSubtitle: Patients and approved doctors sign in here.
auth.loginHero: Care that follows you, from village to specialist.
auth.adminNote: Platform admins use credentials from server ADMIN_EMAIL / ADMIN_PASSWORD and are redirected to the admin dashboard.
auth.redirectScanner: Sign in to continue to the AI Symptom Scanner
auth.redirectAccount: Sign in to continue to your account
auth.registerStep1: Step 1 of 2 — Choose how you'll use the platform. You'll fill in your details next.
auth.patientRoleDesc: Book specialists and manage your health records
auth.doctorRoleDesc: Offer video consults and manage your practice
auth.certificateHint: Registration certificate, medical council ID, or equivalent — required for admin verification.
auth.sameSignInNote: Patients, doctors, and admins all use the same sign-in page — you'll land on the dashboard for your role.
auth.applicationSubmittedDesc: An admin will review your medical certificate and license details. You will receive access after approval — then sign in from the login page.
auth.selectRoleError: Please select how you want to use the platform
auth.certificateRequired: Upload your medical registration certificate (PDF or image)
auth.forgotHeroDesc: We email a 6-digit code. Only the latest code works, and it expires in 2 minutes.
auth.forgotEmailDesc: Enter your account email. We'll send a verification code if the account exists.
auth.codeExpiredHint: Code expired — tap resend to get a new code.
auth.passwordUpdatedDesc: You can now sign in with your new password.

landing.heroDesc: Book video consults with specialists, scan symptoms with AI, and keep your medical history secure — all in one app.
landing.multilingualFeature: English and Hindi — UI and AI answers in your language.
landing.heroImageAlt: Rural patient connecting with a specialist over telehealth
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to deliver care
landing.featuresSubtitle: A complete telehealth toolkit for patients, doctors and clinics.

features.videoDesc: Adaptive 240p–360p video with automatic audio fallback for weak rural networks.
features.scannerDesc: Triage in seconds with explainable risk scoring.
features.docDesc: Upload PDFs, X-rays, MRIs, and prescriptions — page-by-page scan, charts, and AI Q&A.
features.schedulingDesc: Find the right doctor and slot in under a minute.

steps.1desc: Use the AI scanner or pick a specialty.
steps.2desc: Browse verified specialists and choose a time that works for you.
steps.3desc: Join from any device — even on 3G connections.
steps.4desc: Digital prescription saved to your records instantly.

testimonials.1q: I got a cardiologist consult from my village in 20 minutes. This is life-changing.
testimonials.2q: The AI scanner caught early signs of pneumonia in my son. Forever grateful.
testimonials.3q: All my reports in one place. No more carrying paper files to every doctor.

faq.1q: Is the platform free for patients?
faq.1a: Sign-up is free. Book a consultation time with a doctor and join your video visit when they confirm the slot.
faq.2q: Does it work on slow internet?
faq.2a: Yes. Video is optimized for 2G/3G, and you can fall back to audio-only with a single tap.
faq.3a: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. You control who sees what, with consent-first sharing.
faq.4a: English and Hindi for the UI and AI answers today, with more Indian languages on the roadmap.

landing.ctaTitle: Bring world-class care to your community.
landing.ctaDesc: Create your account in under a minute — patients, doctors and clinics welcome.
landing.footerTagline: Bringing specialist healthcare to every village with secure video care, AI triage, and a unified medical record.

dashboard.statusMonitor: A few health markers to keep an eye on
dashboard.statusStable: Your health score is stable today
dashboard.noUpcoming: No upcoming visits — book a doctor when you're ready.

ai.scannerSubtitle: Symptom scan, risk analysis, and preventive guidance.
ai.docChatDesc: Answers use semantic search over your uploaded reports and prescriptions.
ai.askPlaceholder: Ask about your reports, medicines, or lab values…
ai.uploadFirst: Upload a report or prescription in the Library tab first.

suggestions.abnormal: What is abnormal in my latest report?
suggestions.sugar: Is my blood sugar in range?
suggestions.doctorAsk: What should I ask my doctor?

ai.ragNote: Answers use semantic search over your uploaded reports and prescriptions (RAG). Only your files are used.
ai.uploadPrompt: Upload at least one report or prescription first, then ask questions here.
ai.limitedMatches: Limited matches — upload clearer scans or ask a more specific question.
ai.placeholderDisabled: Upload documents first to enable chat
ai.tapOrDescribe: Tap symptoms or describe how you feel.
ai.describePlaceholder: Describe how you feel in your own words — when it started, severity, triggers…
ai.describeHint: Your description is analyzed by AI for clinical flags, then combined with rules and vitals to set severity — not a replacement for a doctor.
ai.vitalsHint: If you have a home monitor, enter recent readings. These adjust your rule-based severity score — not a diagnosis.
